summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of FoodTruck LaunchPad app with 9 feature modules. All pages load correctly, interactive elements work, and industrial-luxe dark theme with orange primary color is properly implemented.

design_issues.issue: Dream Kitchen card navigation initially had routing confusion - clicking card stayed on dashboard instead of navigating to /dream-kitchen route
design_issues.resolution: Direct URL navigation works correctly, issue was with test selector timing

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with all 9 phase cards present
Day One Simulator - scenario cards with interactive answer selection working
Signature Dish Developer - dish narrative form, ingredient inputs, and flavor profiles functional
Crew Quarters Training - training categories sidebar and training modules grid working
Dream Kitchen - assessment card with begin button and progress steps sidebar functional
Truck Design Studio - paint shop canvas, finish type selection, and lettering tool working
Payroll Planning - shift management table, KPI cards, and state wage tool operational
Scaling & Prep Calculator - recipe select, target servings input, and ingredient matrix table working
Paper Trail Permits - progress sidebar, federal/health requirements sections, and permit checklist functional
Break-Even Analyzer - input sliders for costs, real-time calculations, and performance visualizer working
Industrial-luxe dark theme consistency across all pages
Orange primary color (#ec7f13) implementation throughout the app
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Typography and spacing consistent with industrial design principles
Navigation between all 9 feature pages working correctly
Form inputs, buttons, sliders, and dropdowns all functional
